options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <delay_value> # Specifies the delay value to be applied

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the annotated delay is to be applied on cell

options.name: -cond
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applied on arcs which has this condition as true

options.name: -delta_only
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applied as incremental delay

options.name: -fall
options.description: Specifies the annotated delay is applicable on fall transisiton

options.name: -from
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applied on arcs from this pin

options.name: -increment
options.description: Increments the specified delay value on top of the existing base delay value

options.name: -max
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applicable on late paths

options.name: -min
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applicable on early paths

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the annotated delay is to be applied on net

options.name: -rise
options.description: Specifies the annotated delay is applicable on rise transisiton

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies that annotated delay is applied on arcs to this pin
